steps.observed: Transaction list displayed with all seed transactions

steps.expected: Date, name/merchant, amount, category badge, account name visible
steps.observed: All columns present: date, name, formatted currency amount, colored category badge, account name
Transactions sorted newest first (Mar 16 at top, Mar 1 at bottom)
3 transactions shown within date range (H&M Clothing, Target, Auto Insurance)
Clear button appears, count shows '3 transactions found'
All 11 predefined categories plus custom 'Pet Care' shown as buttons
2 Groceries transactions shown (Trader Joe's, Whole Foods Market), filter shows '1 selected'
Button shows '1 selected' text, Clear button visible

steps.action: Select 'Capital One Quicksilver' from account dropdown
steps.observed: 6 transactions shown, all with 'Capital One Quicksilver' account
Clear button visible, count updated
1 result: 'Dinner at Olive Garden' shown
'No transactions found' with message 'Try adjusting your filters or search' and 'Clear all filters' button
Modal form opened with Type toggle (Expense/Income), Date, Name, Amount, Account, Category, Notes, Mark as Transfer fields

steps.action: Fill form: Date=2026-03-14, Name='TEST-TXN: Coffee Shop Visit', Amount=25.50, Account=Alliant Primary Checking, Category=Eating Out
steps.observed: All fields populated correctly

steps.expected: Transaction appears in list at correct position
steps.observed: Transaction added, appears at Mar 14 position (between Mar 15 and Mar 13 entries)

steps.action: Search for 'TEST-TXN: Coffee' and click Edit button
steps.expected: Edit form opens with pre-populated data
steps.observed: Edit form opened with all fields pre-populated (name, date, amount, account, category)

steps.action: Change name to 'TEST-TXN: Edited Coffee Visit' and amount to 35.00
steps.observed: Fields updated successfully
Transaction name updated to 'TEST-TXN: Edited Coffee Visit', amount to -$35.00

steps.action: Create new test transaction 'TEST-TXN: Delete Me' ($10.00)
steps.observed: Transaction created successfully

steps.action: Search for 'TEST-TXN: Delete' and click Delete button
steps.observed: Dialog shown: 'Are you sure you want to delete TEST-TXN: Delete Me? This will also remove any associated splits. This action cannot be undone.' with Cancel and Delete buttons
Transaction removed, search shows 0 results

steps.action: Open 'Add Transaction' form and click category dropdown
steps.expected: All 11 predefined categories plus custom categories shown
steps.observed: 12 categories displayed: Rent/Home, Groceries, Eating Out, Bars/Clubs/Going Out, Other Fun Activities, Clothing, Insurance, Subscriptions, Home Goods, Vacations, Large Purchases (11 predefined) + Pet Care (custom)
Category selection works, saved correctly with transaction (verified through add/edit flows)

steps.action: Create $100 transaction 'TEST-TXN: Split Test Purchase' and click Split button
steps.observed: Split modal opens with transaction name, total amount, two split rows (category + amount), Add Split button, validation display

steps.action: Set Split 1: Groceries $80, Split 2: Home Goods $20
steps.observed: Split total: $100.00 with green '✓ Matches' indicator, Save Splits button enabled
Split total: $110.00 with red 'Over by $10.00' warning
Splits saved, dialog closed

steps.action: Edit 'TEST-TXN: Edited Coffee Visit' and toggle 'Mark as Transfer' switch ON
steps.observed: Toggle turned blue/ON, helper text says 'Transfers are excluded from spending & budgets'
Transaction shows 'Transfer' badge next to name, amount displayed without minus sign (neutral display vs red for expenses)

assertions.title: Amount display for income vs expense

steps.action: View transaction list with mixed income and expense
steps.expected: Expenses in red/minus, income in green/plus
steps.observed: Expenses show in red text with minus sign (e.g., -$100.00, -$25.50). Income shows in green text with plus sign (e.g., +$5,000.00 with 'Income' badge). Transfers show in neutral/gray without sign prefix.
Form has prominent Expense/Income toggle buttons at top, Expense highlighted in red, Income in white

steps.action: Open 'Add Transaction' form, clear date, leave all fields empty, click submit
steps.expected: Inline validation errors for required fields
steps.observed: Inline red error messages shown: 'Date is required', 'Name is required', 'Amount is required', 'Account is required'. Fields highlighted with red borders. Form not submitted.

frictions.description: Transaction row action buttons (Split, Edit, Delete) sometimes not captured by `snapshot -i` when the transaction list extends beyond viewport. Had to use search filter or `find role button` to locate and click them.
frictions.resolution: Used search filter to narrow list, then used `find role button click --name` to interact with buttons not captured by snapshot -i

frictions.description: Other test groups (TEST-BUD, TEST-NAV) had created test transactions that appear in the list alongside seed data. This didn't block testing but added visual noise.
frictions.resolution: Used search filter to isolate test transactions when needed

summary: Tested 13 assertions: all 13 passed. Transaction CRUD (add, edit, delete), filtering (date range, category, account, search), split transactions with validation, transfer marking, income vs expense display, and form validation all work correctly with no console errors.
